answers.q2: Simple numbered list for now, with the ability to group chapters into volumes or arcs later if needed.
answers.q7: Allow horizontal pan/zoom for spreads while keeping the full image intact.
answers.q21: All of the above, but with user-level controls to enable/disable each notification type
answers.q22: Email notifications only (no WhatsApp). Required emails: new chapter releases. Optional emails: announcements. No email notifications are needed for replies or other user interactions
answers.q30:
I care a lot about how the reader feels while using the platform — it should be comfortable, immersive, and easy to navigate.
I prefer a calm, uncluttered experience where the focus is always on the story.
